title: selliguea stenopteris
intro: Selliguea stenopteris, also known as the umbrella plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of fern native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been shown to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can be beneficial for treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. Selliguea stenopteris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in traditional remedies to promote healing and well-being.
